body:
HOW TO GET THIS UPDATE (v3.05)

Always use the same download link from your original Gumroad email. Open that email and click the same link - it will automatically download the latest version (3.05).

You NEVER need to purchase again to receive updates.

Stable Release 3.05

What's New

New Features

- Conditional Math Logic Wizard:
  - Build complex interactive logic with zero code.
  - Evaluate a widget value and perform math operations on a persistent variable.
  - Perfect for counters, score systems, dynamic calculations, and state-based interactions.

- Array / List Manager (In-Memory):
  - Create and manage arrays stored in memory.
  - Add, remove, update, and retrieve values dynamically.
  - Designed for advanced state management without writing code.

New Demo Included

- demo_new_logic_command.json

Previous Version - 3.04

- Brand new FFmpeg plugin included.
- 26 built-in FFmpeg commands available.
- Added new Wizard commands.
- Bugs fixed.
- New demos added.

Previous Version - 3.03

- New multimedia commands for FFmpeg.
- New demo project: demo_ffmpeg_editor.json
- Minor bugs fixed.

Previous Version - 3.00

- Select All Widgets (Page Option).
- System Tray Icon Demo.
- More built-in themes.
- Dialog Builder plugin added.
- Improved intelligent error detection.

Previous Version - 2.99

- Runtime error reporting improved.
- 10 new Table Widget commands.

Previous Version - 2.98

- DraggableTableWidget added.
- DraggableFileDropZone added.
- New demos included.

Previous Version - 2.97

- Data Binding & Sync.
- No-Code Logic wizards.
- INI persistence commands.
- 3D OpenGL Viewer plugin.

Previous Version - 2.96

- Cursor style fixes.
- New anchor positions.

Previous Version - 2.95

- CLI build support added.

Previous Version - 2.94

- AI optimization improvements.
- Relative paths fixed in preview.

Previous Version - 2.93

- New demos added.
- macOS and Linux export.
- Updated translations.
